# BowEcho Radar Toolbox Changelog

## 0.1.0

- Added browser palette import/export helpers for GR-style `.pal` files, color family binding, product compatibility, normalized palette validation, and WASM render-time custom palette application.
- Added user-palette library helpers: stable palette IDs, `createPaletteFromStops`, `clonePalette`, `palettePreviewCss`, `serializePaletteLibrary`, `deserializePaletteLibrary`, `createPaletteStore`, localStorage/memory persistence, and `examples/palette-store-editor.html`.
- Added session-controller APIs: `createRadarSession`, `toolbox.createSession`, `productDescriptor`, `cutChoicesFromMetadata`, `loopTimeline`, and `examples/radar-session-controller.html` for site/product/arbitrary tilt/live polling/playback state that uses rerender and warm-cache paths instead of fresh loop loads.
- Added product capability hints: `PRODUCT_CAPABILITY_CATALOG`, `productCapability`, `productChoicesFromMetadata`, `capabilityHintsFromMetadata`, class-method wrappers, and session `snapshot().capabilities` for product availability, supported cuts, feature gates, and recommended warm targets.
- Added reconstructed vertical cross-section APIs: `renderCrossSection`, `renderCrossSections`, `renderCrossSectionLoop`, `radarCrossSectionPanel`, loop panel helpers, exact-size drawing, worker-side section caching, and `examples/cross-section-loop.html`.
- Added native RHI/mobile-scan APIs: `renderNativeRhi`, `renderNativeRhiFrames`, `renderNativeRhiLoop`, `drawNativeRhiToCanvas`, worker-side native-RHI caching, automatic RHI cut selection from diagnostics, no-implicit-downscale guards, and `examples/native-rhi.html`.
- Added arbitrary-date NEXRAD archive replay APIs: `nexradArchiveDatePrefix`, `nexradArchiveListingUrl`, `parseNexradArchiveListing`, `archiveFrameWindow`, `archiveFramesForDate`, `archiveLoopFramesForDate`, `loadArchiveLoop`, and `examples/archive-replay.html`.
- Added BowEcho v0.22.0-style SPC outlook overlay APIs: `spcOutlookKinds`, `spcOutlookLiveUrls`, `spcOutlookArchiveUrls`, `spcOutlookUrls`, `parseSpcOutlook`, `spcOutlookFeatureCollection`, `fetchSpcOutlook`, `fetchSpcOutlooks`, live day-1 0100 fallback behavior, archive issue-order probing, and `examples/spc-outlook-planner.html`.
- Added SPC event-planning APIs: `spcConvectiveDate`, `spcReportsUrls`, `parseSpcReportsCombined`, `parseSpcTornadoSegments`, `fetchSpcEventDay`, `selectEventRadarSites`, `eventArchiveFrameWindow`, `eventArchivePlanForTrack`, and `examples/spc-event-planner.html`.
- Added BowEcho v0.22 custom GR2A poll-link APIs: `normalizeCustomPollUrl`, `pollUrlsMatch`, `pollUrlName`, `parseCustomPollMarkerInputs`, `parseCustomRadarGis`, `customPollLinksFromGis`, `upsertCustomPollLink`, `customPollLinkFeed`, `customPollMarkers`, global `customPollLinks` source catalog integration, and `examples/custom-poll-links.html`.
- Added decoded-volume diagnostics APIs: `volumeDiagnostics`, `volumeDiagnosticsLoop`, worker-side diagnostics caching, scan-mode/RHI-like/PPI-like cut flags, per-cut gate/moment coverage, and 3D buffer-size estimates for full-resolution WebGPU/Three.js volume views via `examples/volume-diagnostics.html`.
- Added native analysis overlay APIs: `analyzeFrame`, `analyzeFrames`, `analyzeLoop`, `radarAnalysisOverlay`, loop overlay helpers, worker-side analysis caching, storm-cell/rotation GeoJSON output, and `examples/analysis-overlay.html`.
- Added TOR tracks/TDS APIs: `renderTorTracksFrame`, `renderTorTracksFrames`, `renderTorTracksLoop`, `radarTorTracksLayer`, `drawTorTracksToCanvas`, loop layer helpers, worker-side shear-grid caching, running-max loop accumulation, raw shear values, TDS GeoJSON output, and `examples/tor-tracks-loop.html`.
- Added first-party map/GPU adapter helpers: Mapbox/MapLibre image, canvas, raster, and site source/layer specs; deck.gl bitmap and site scatterplot props; WebGPU texture upload descriptors; exact radar-layer canvas drawing; and `examples/map-adapters.html`.
- Added Web Mercator map viewport helpers: `normalizeMapView`, `fitMapViewToBounds`, `fitMapViewToLayer`, `panMapView`, `zoomMapView`, `mapTileCover`, `radarLayerQuadMesh`, world-pixel projection helpers, and `examples/map-viewport.html` for tile wrapping, antimeridian-safe camera state, clickable sites, and custom WebGL/WebGPU/canvas radar quad placement.
- Added global source/provider catalog helpers: generated `global-radar-catalog.js`, `GLOBAL_RADAR_PROVIDERS`, `INTERNATIONAL_RADAR_SITES`, `COMMUNITY_RADAR_FEEDS`, `COMMUNITY_RADAR_MARKERS`, `radarSourceCatalog`, `globalRadarSites`, `globalRadarSitesGeoJson`, `nearestRadarSite`, map adapter helpers, source summaries, and `examples/global-source-catalog.html`.
- Added community GR2A feed planner APIs: `communityRadarFeed`, `parseCommunityDirList`, `newestCommunityDirListEntry`, `parseGrLevel2CfgSites`, `fetchCommunityDirList`, `communityFeedFrameFromEntry`, `latestCommunityFrame`, `recentCommunityFrames`, `loadCommunityLoop`, `pollCommunityLive`, and `examples/community-feed-planner.html`.
- Added SMHI Sweden international planner APIs: `smhiAreaCatalogUrl`, `smhiQcvolCatalogUrl`, `smhiDatedQcvolUrl`, `parseSmhiAreaCatalog`, `parseSmhiQcvolCatalog`, `smhiFramePlanFromCatalog`, `smhiFramePlansFromCatalog`, generic `"smhi"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-smhi-planner.html`.
- Added GeoSphere Austria international planner APIs: `geosphereStartAfterKey`, `geosphereVolumeListingUrl`, `parseGeosphereVolumeListing`, `geosphereFramePlanFromListing`, `geosphereFramePlansFromListing`, generic `"geosphere"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-geosphere-planner.html`.
- Added browser split-volume merge support: `decode_supported_volume_parts` in the WASM package plus worker handling for `frame.merge && frame.urls`, preserving each ODIM part as its own decoded volume before merging in `radar_core`.
- Added SHMU Slovakia split-volume international planner APIs: `parseAutoIndexListing`, `shmuVolumeRootUrl`, `shmuSiteCatalogUrl`, `shmuProductCatalogUrl`, `shmuProductDateListingUrl`, `parseShmuDateListing`, `parseShmuFileListing`, `shmuFramePlanFromProductFiles`, `shmuFramePlansFromProductFiles`, generic `"shmu"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-shmu-planner.html`.
- Added DWD Germany sweep-volume international planner APIs: `dwdSitesRootUrl`, `dwdProductCatalogUrl`, `dwdProductStationCatalogUrl`, `dwdProductHdf5CatalogUrl`, `dwdProductSweepListingUrl`, `parseDwdSweepListing`, `dwdFramePlanFromProductSweeps`, `dwdFramePlansFromProductSweeps`, generic `"dwd"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-dwd-planner.html`.
- Added CHMI Czechia task-volume international planner APIs: `chmiSitesRootUrl`, `chmiSiteCatalogUrl`, `chmiProductCatalogUrl`, `chmiProductHdf5ListingUrl`, `parseChmiFileListing`, `chmiFramePlanFromProductFiles`, `chmiFramePlansFromProductFiles`, generic `"chmi"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-chmi-planner.html`.
- Added JMA Japan GRIB2 tar planner APIs: `jmaRadarBaseUrl`, `jmaTarUrl`, `jmaCandidateStamps`, `jmaFramePlanFromStamp`, generic `"jma"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, a station-filtered `decode_jma_tar_station` worker/WASM path, URL-level byte caching for shared tar downloads, and `examples/international-jma-planner.html`.
- Added EUMETNET ORD ODIM_H5 planner APIs: `ordBucketBaseUrl`, `ordObjectKinds`, `ordHourPrefix`, `ordHourListingUrl`, `parseOrdObjectKey`, `ordFramePlansFromKeys`, `ordFramePlanFromKeys`, generic `"ord"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-ord-planner.html`.
- Added DMI Denmark international planner APIs: `internationalRadarProvider`, `internationalRadarSite`, `dmiVolumeItemsUrl`, `parseDmiVolumeItems`, `dmiFramePlanFromItems`, `dmiFramePlansFromItems`, `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `internationalFrameFromPlan`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-dmi-planner.html`.
- Added FMI Finland international planner APIs: `s3StyleListingUrl`, `parseS3StyleListing`, `fmiDatePrefix`, `fmiCatalogListingUrl`, `fmiRadarVolumeListingUrl`, `parseFmiVolumeListing`, `fmiFramePlanFromListing`, `fmiFramePlansFromListing`, generic `"fmi"` support in `latestInternationalFramePlan`, `recentInternationalFramePlans`, `latestInternationalFrame`, `recentInternationalFrames`, `loadInternationalLoop`, `pollInternationalLive`, and `examples/international-fmi-planner.html`.
- Added pixel-level multi-site compositing: `compositeRadarLayers`, `compositeLoopSlot`, `compositeSynchronizedRadarLoopSlot`, `drawCompositeToCanvas`, nearest-neighbor georeferenced resampling, no-implicit-downscale grid inference, and `examples/multi-site-composite.html`.
- Added supported-format byte/archive import APIs: `supportedByteFormats`, `supportedArchiveFormats`, `frameProviders`, `isZipBytes`, `parseZipDirectory`, `extractZipEntries`, `extractMobileArchiveEntries`, `sniffBytes`, `importBytesFrame`, `importFileFrame`, `importMobileArchiveFrame`, `importFiles`, `frameFromUrl`, and `loadImportedLoop`, with worker-side byte/part/volume caching and `examples/byte-import.html`.
- Added hot-loop cache controls: larger default worker caches, `configureCache`, `warmFrames`, `warmLoop`, and `examples/cache-warm.html` so generated UIs can preload decoded volumes and avoid refetch/redecode churn during product, tilt, range, and playback changes.
- Added synchronized multi-site loop APIs: `loadMultiSiteLoop`, `rerenderMultiSiteLoop`, `pollMultiSiteLive`, and `synchronizeRadarLoops`.
- Added `examples/multi-site-sync.html` as a compact synchronized multi-radar reference UI.
- Added `examples/dogfood-radar-app.html` as a compact end-to-end SDK dogfood app with clickable NEXRAD map selection, live/recent/archive loading, product and tilt controls, playback, cache warming, SPC outlook URL planning, exact-pixel canvas rendering, and live-frame pixel diagnostics/readout badges.
- Added typed package metadata for `@fahrenheitresearch/bowecho-radar-toolbox`.
- Added TypeScript declarations for the browser SDK, worker contract, loop/frame shapes, cache stats, and renderer texture metadata.
- Added `tests/sdk-contract.mjs` to verify catalog shape, profiler filtering, full-resolution texture payloads, native RHI no-downscale defaults, coordinate helpers, fake-worker render paths, multi-site sync, and cache APIs.
- Exposed renderer-neutral map helpers for site GeoJSON, radar texture descriptors, Web Mercator bounds, and radar-local coordinate transforms.
- Exposed 21 browser-ready products and 204 non-profiler radar sites.
- Preserved the client-side worker/WASM fetch/decode/render path for live and archive Level II loops.
